summary: Summarize an authorized notes directory in a tiny local app.

summaryI18n.en: Summarize an authorized notes directory in a tiny local app.
summaryI18n.zh: 通过一个轻量本地 app 汇总已授权的 notes 目录。

description: A small NextClaw app that reads a granted notes directory and returns a compact summary through the local host bridge.

descriptionI18n.en: A small NextClaw app that reads a granted notes directory and returns a compact summary through the local host bridge.
descriptionI18n.zh: 一个小型 NextClaw app，通过本地宿主桥接读取已授权 notes 目录并返回简洁摘要。

author: NextClaw
